comment.body: this same pattern now can be considered as multiple top rejection. As you can see the narrative can be changed from invers Hns(bullish) to multiple top (bearish) depending on the PA, which is why i'm not confident on trusting the patterns (other than they give some visual confluence and makes us happy when it works, if it works), Instead statistical pattern like linear regression / fibonacci, etc are atleast decent as they are dependent on PA. Im just expression my opinion, not trying to influence anyone, please don't hate me.
